claims.statement: The tested collision-ON marine parcel profile has numerically supported absolute control and seeding rain-water state at the reviewed resolution gate.
claims.scope: rain_response_targeted profile; four OFAT cases; five common seeds; finest versus next-finest comparisons

claims.statement: A quantitative seeding-minus-control enhancement magnitude is not supported for v1.0.
claims.limitation: Only 11 of 105 response convergence checks passed and every seed independently rejected response support.

claims.statement: All five finest-reference seeds had positive final rain response direction in the targeted run.
claims.limitation: This finite-sample descriptive observation does not override failed response convergence and is not an effect estimate.

claims.statement: The 1% rain-liquid fraction is an internal event-detection floor, not an observational standard.
claims.sensitivity: Interpretation requires 0.5/1/2% fraction and 20/25/30 micrometre radius sensitivity plus cadence-quality review.

claims.statement: No external observation calibrates or validates the model transition floor in v1.0.
claims.limitation: BASTALIAS samples a moving transect and ARM ENA samples a fixed Eulerian column; neither demonstrates the Lagrangian parcel-time and observable mapping required by the model.

claims.statement: v1.0 makes no claim about real-world cloud-seeding efficacy, causality, or operational precipitation enhancement.
claims.limitation: The project is a parcel-model experiment workflow and has no matched field intervention validation.
